violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. - Prep Cooler found at 45F and higher, need to fill all empty holes to ensure cooler stays cold.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. - Need for use of QT
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. - Found empty at time of inspection.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
